questionHtml:
A spaceship is travelling at 0.60c from Earth when it launches a probe at 0.10c relative to the spaceship and away from Earth.

What is the speed of the probe relative to Earth?


A.  0.50c

B.  0.66c

C.  0.75c

D.  0.90c

meta.title: A spaceship is travelling at 0.60c from Earth when it launches a probe at 0.10c relative to the spaceship and away from Earth. What is the speed of the probe relative to Earth? A.
